summary_lines: Baseline unsoldered board still reads 0x40 by itself.
With the leftmost-bridge board added, the bus still shows only 0x40. That board is present on the bus but not on one of the low target addresses.
With the second-left-bridge board added, the bus still shows only 0x40. That board is present on the bus but not on one of the low target addresses.
With the third-left-bridge board added, the bus still shows only 0x40. That board is present on the bus but not on one of the low target addresses.
With all four boards connected, the runtime saw 0x40.
